radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription package selection radio buttons section. Contains the list of selectable subscription options and controls their visual style, layout, and purchase behavior.

indicator_alignment.description: Alignment of the selection indicator (radio dot) within the radio button. 'left' aligns the indicator to the left side, 'right' aligns it to the right side. Any other value hides the indicator entirely.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

buttons.description: List of radio button items, each representing a subscription package option that the user can select.

badge.description: Badge overlay displayed on the radio button, typically used for promotional labels like discount percentages or 'Best Value' indicators.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

color.description: Color value from the backend for the badge text.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color value from the backend for the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color value from the backend for the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state.

variant.description: Badge variant controlling layout and styling. 'v3' uses an alternate badge style with different sizing, margins, and visibility behavior on selection state changes. Other values use the default badge style.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: Whether to hide the badge when the parent radio button is not selected. When true, the badge is only visible on the currently selected option.

text.description: Display text shown inside the badge label (e.g., a promotional or discount label).

selected_bg_color.description: Background color value from the backend applied when the radio button is in the selected state.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color value from the backend applied when the radio button is in the deselected (non-selected) state.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

selected_border_color.description: Border color value from the backend applied when the radio button is in the selected state.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is pre-selected by default when the screen loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: Whether to use an enlarged/expanded layout for this radio button, giving it more visual prominence compared to other options.

id.description: Subscription package identifier for this radio button option. Used to initiate the purchase flow when this option is selected.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color value from the backend applied when the radio button is in the deselected (non-selected) state.

border_color.description: Border color value from the backend applied when the radio button is in the deselected (non-selected) state.

gradient_type.description: Gradient style applied to the badge background. 'gold' uses a special gold gradient drawable. Other non-empty values are resolved from the Design System CascadeGradients by name. An empty string falls back to border-color-based styling instead of a gradient.

purchase_on_select.description: Whether selecting a radio button triggers an immediate purchase flow via double-tap behavior, rather than requiring a separate CTA button tap.

type.description: Determines the visual style of the radio buttons. 'tiers_style' uses the OptimusHalfRadioButtonComponent (tier-based layout); any other value (or null) uses the default SubscriptionRadioButtonComponent.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration for the trial reminder toggle component that allows users to opt in or out of receiving a reminder before their free trial ends. Has enabled and disabled states, each with its own display text and associated package ID.

is_enabled.description: Whether the trial reminder toggle is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the trial reminder toggle component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration for the placeholder text displayed alongside or near the toggle components (switch_package_toggle and trial_reminder_toggle), providing contextual information about the toggle functionality.

is_enabled.description: Whether the toggle placeholder text is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the placeholder text is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the toggle placeholder text component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for the screen content variant. Used to look up the specific screen configuration from remote settings and for analytics tracking as the offer variant name.

footer.description: Configuration for a footer component on the Optimus screen. Defined in the data model as a placeholder for footer content.

is_enabled.description: Whether the footer component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the footer is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the footer component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

banner.description: Configuration for the subscription banner component that displays media content (images/animations) with optional click actions. The banner can contain multiple banner values, each with a URL, action hook, and placeholder.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the banner is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the banner component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

description.description: Configuration for a description text component on the Optimus screen. Defined in the data model as a placeholder for additional descriptive content.

is_enabled.description: Whether the description component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the description is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the description component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

title.description: Configuration for the title text component on the Optimus subscription offer screen. Rendered with Typography.T6 and semi-bold font weight. The resolved content includes text and a color value from the Design System (CascadeColorPackage).

is_enabled.description: Whether the title component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the title is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the title component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

close_button.description: Configuration for the close/dismiss button on the subscription offer screen. Supports configurable alignment (LEFT or RIGHT), custom icon URL, top and side margins, and optional delayed appearance.

is_enabled.description: Whether the close button is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, a default close button is shown instead.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the close button component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

subtitle.description: Configuration for the subtitle text component displayed below the title. Rendered with Typography.T5 and medium font weight. The resolved content includes text and a color value from the Design System (CascadeColorPackage).

is_enabled.description: Whether the subtitle component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the subtitle is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subtitle component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration for the banner placeholder component that displays promotional text (with bold typography) and an optional badge image above the main banner area. Supports a gradient shadow overlay beneath it.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner placeholder component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the banner placeholder is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the banner placeholder component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

secondary_button.description: Configuration for the secondary action button displayed as underlined text. When tapped, it either opens a deep link (hook URL) if an action is configured, or shows a subscription tiers comparison half-screen dialog.

is_enabled.description: Whether the secondary button is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the button is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the secondary button component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

logo.description: Configuration for the logo component on the Optimus subscription offer screen. Defined in the data model for displaying a brand logo.

is_enabled.description: Whether the logo component is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the logo is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the logo component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration for the package switching toggle component. When toggled, it switches between two sets of subscription packages, each with its own title, subtitle, description, and package ID. Tracked in analytics as a toggle checked event.

is_enabled.description: Whether the switch package toggle is enabled and visible on the screen. When false, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin compiler stability metadata flag for this data class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the switch package toggle component, used to resolve its content from remote configuration.
